summary: Fix the approval-chain cleanup migration to respect NOT NULL comment columns and deploy the simplified template-progress chain.

notes: Migration 103 clears exact system repair comments to an empty string because approval_nodes.comment is NOT NULL.
The failed V0.18.4 attempt did not record migration 103 in schema_migrations.
Same user-facing chain simplification as V0.18.4.

verification: After deploy, run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.5.
After deploy, run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/.
known_warnings: ESLint still reports existing warnings in dashboard/ui/TimesheetPage files, but exits 0.
Vite still warns that the main index chunk is larger than 500 kB.
